titleStmt.title: SII 16.188: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 188. (A.R. No. 80 of 1915.) PEDDA-AHŌBALAM, SIRVEL TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up near the Dūruḍu-maṇḍapa on the way to upper Ahōbalam.
This is dated Śaka 1476 (current), Pramādi, Śrāvaṇa ba. 10, Thursday corresponding to 1553 A.D., August 3.

It registers an endowment of twenty varāhas as poliyūṭṭu for maintaining offerings during the sixteen days of festivals every year when god Ahōbalēśvara was seated in the sixteen pillared maṇḍapa built by Mahamaṇdalēśvara Apratīkamalla Kuruchēṭi Veṅkaṭādridēva-mahārāju, son of Ōbuḷrāju and grandson of Timmarājaya of Kāśyapagōtra, Āpastaṁba-sūtra, Yajuś-śākha and solar race.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṁ śubhamastu . śrīnaraśuṁhvāya namaḥ . dēvaśrēṇi śirōratnaṁ da
yityadvipaghaṭāṁkuśaṁ . jayatu śrīnaraśiṁhvasya dēvadēvasya śāsanaṁ .
svasti śrījayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1476 Agunēṭi
pramādīca saṁvvatsara śrāvaṇa ba 10 gu śrīmadrājādhirāja rāja
paramēśvara śrīvīra pratāpa śrīvīra sadāśivadēvarāyamahārāya
lu vidyānagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhāsanārūḍhuḍayi pṛdhvīsāmrājyaṁ cē
yucuṁḍḍagānu svasti śrī ceturdaśabhuvanādhīśvara śrīAhōbhaḷa vīranāraśuṁhva
dēvuni divyaśrīcaraṇāraviṁdaṁbulanu kāśyapagōtraṁ Āpastaṁbasūtra
ṁ yajuśākhādhyāyilaina sūryavaṁśōdbhavulaina śrīmaṁmahāmaṁ
ḍalēśvara Apratīkamalla kurujēṭi tiṁma rājadēvamahārāju
lugāri pautṛlaina Ōbuḷrājugāri putṛḍaina veṁkaṭādridēvamahā
rājulu sadvinayabhayabhaktiṁni sāṣṭāṁga Anaṁtaṁbulai
na daṁḍamulu samarpiṁciyiccina śilāmaṁḍapaṁ polivuṭu dha
rmaśāsanakramameṭlaṁnnanu svāmi nidhimīdanuṁḍi diguvatirupa
tiki mahōtsavālu Avadhariṁccanu digivēṁcēśina dinālaku
diguvatirupatinuṁḍi nidhimīdiki vēṁccēśina dinālaku vubha
yaṁ tōyalu reṁṭanu yēṁḍi 1 ki dinālu 16 kiṁni nūṁ
paḍunāllamīdanu gaṭiṁcina padārugaṁbhāla ghanaśilāmaṁḍa
paṁ gaṭiṁcci Ā maṁḍapaṁmīdanu svāmi vēṁcēyanavadhari
ṁcci Āragiṁpu kaṭaḍacēśina vivaraṁ di 1 ki pseru bēḷalu ma 2 bella
kha 0 3 nu Aḍakyemudu pōṁkalu 12 Ākulu 24 yī dha ma Ā
ragiṁce dinālu 16 kiṁni śrībhaṁḍārānaku polivoṭu samarpiṁ
cci yicina rokhaṁ va ga 20 . Akṣarālānu yiruvaivarahālu varu
ṣāna tiruvilavugānu vaccina rokhaṁgānu yī maṁḍapaṁ mīdanu
vēṁccēśina śēyiṁpakalavārani trivācakaṁgānu daṁ
ḍaṁ samapi ṁci yici [Acaṁdrārkasthā]yigānu yī
prakāraṁ naḍapiṁcē Aṭugānu vēyiṁccina dharmaśāsanaṁ . śrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.188 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
